mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${table} (order_no, user_id, total_amount, pay_amount, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{order.orderNo}, #{order.userId}, #{order.totalAmount}, #{order.payAmount}, #{order.status}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO ${table} (order_no, product_id, product_name, store_id, store_name, product_image_url, product_description, unit_price, quantity) VALUES (#{item.orderNo}, #{item.productId}, #{item.productName}, #{item.storeId}, #{item.storeName}, #{item.productImageUrl}, #{item.productDescription}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_id AS buyerUserId, o.status AS status, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.created_at AS createdAt, MIN(i.product_name) AS productTitle, MIN(i.product_image_url) AS productImageUrl, SUM(i.quantity) AS quantity, COUNT(1) AS itemCount, MIN(i.store_name) AS storeName FROM ( SELECT order_no, user_id, status, pay_amount, created_at FROM order_info_0 UNION ALL SELECT order_no, user_id, status, pay_amount, created_at FROM order_info_1 ) o JOIN ( SELECT order_no, store_id, store_name, product_name, product_image_url, quantity FROM order_item_0 UNION ALL SELECT order_no, store_id, store_name, product_name, product_image_url, quantity FROM order_item_1 ) i ON o.order_no = i.order_no WHERE i.store_id = #{storeId} AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR o.status = #{status}) GROUP BY o.order_no, o.user_id, o.status, o.pay_amount, o.created_at ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalOrders, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('TO_SHIP', 'AFTER_SALE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'FINISHED' THEN t.payAmount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRevenue, MAX(t.updatedAt) AS latestOrderUpdatedAt FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT o.order_no, o.status, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM ( SELECT order_no, status, pay_amount, updated_at FROM order_info_0 UNION ALL SELECT order_no, status, pay_amount, updated_at FROM order_info_1 ) o JOIN ( SELECT order_no, store_id FROM order_item_0 UNION ALL SELECT order_no, store_id FROM order_item_1 ) i ON o.order_no = i.order_no WHERE i.store_id = #{storeId} ) t

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('WAIT_PAY', 'TO_SHIP', 'TO_RECEIVE', 'AFTER_SALE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, MAX(t.updated_at) AS latestUpdatedAt FROM ( SELECT user_id, status, updated_at FROM order_info_0 UNION ALL SELECT user_id, status, updated_at FROM order_info_1 ) t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_id AS userId, o.status, o.pay_amount AS payAmount, o.created_at AS createdAt, IFNULL(i.item_count, 0) AS itemCount FROM ( SELECT * FROM order_info_0 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM order_info_1 ) o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT order_no, COUNT(1) AS item_count FROM ( SELECT order_no FROM order_item_0 UNION ALL SELECT order_no FROM order_item_1 ) t GROUP BY order_no ) i ON o.order_no = i.order_no WHERE (#{userId} IS NULL OR o.user_id = #{userId}) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR o.status = #{status}) ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
